durable_improvement: Added a fail-closed cross-artifact consistency validator so a deployment acceptance record cannot contradict the provider deployment decision or claim acceptance without a returned deployment URL.

verification.workflow_integration: not yet wired; implementation-ready module and tests are committed

deployment_proof.reason: The Cloudflare environment still requires valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN plus an executed workflow.

shared_state_policy: Owner-scoped append-only queue projection; operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json and other teams' records were not overwritten.
next_action: Wire the consistency validator into the Cloudflare workflow after evidence acceptance and before manifest finalization, retain its output, then dispatch with configured credentials and verify the returned URL, served identity, and exact deployed commit.
